label: Layout wall attachment parms
description: Parameters for attaching things to the walls of a room. The element name is the ThingDef defName (the 'def' field). Note: source class name 'LayoutWallAttatchmentParms' preserves the original spelling.

def.label: Thing
def.description: ThingDef to attach to walls. Populated from the XML element name by the keyedObjectList loader.

stuff.label: Stuff
stuff.description: Material (ThingDef) used when the attached thing is stuffable.

countRange.label: Count range
countRange.description: Fixed count range override. Uses IntRange.Invalid to derive count from thingsPer10EdgeCells instead.

thingsPer10EdgeCells.label: Things per 10 edge cells
thingsPer10EdgeCells.description: Random range for how many attachments appear per 10 edge cells.

spawnChancePerPosition.label: Spawn chance per position
spawnChancePerPosition.description: Probability that each eligible wall position receives an attachment.
